title: Projects
subtitle: Manage your projects and track their progress

repoPicker.title: Select Repository
repoPicker.description: Choose or create a git repository for your project.

repoStep.description: Choose a repository for your new project. Selecting a repo will not create the project until you confirm.

detailsStep.description: Confirm the project name, then explicitly create the project.

unsafePath.title: Potentially unsafe repository path
unsafePath.description: This repository path looks temporary or worktree-like. The project may break if the directory is cleaned up or moved.

warnings.tempDir: Path is under a temporary directory.
warnings.gitWorktree: Path looks like a git worktree.

unsafePath.ackLabel: I understand and want to continue

addRepositoryDialog.title: Add repository
addRepositoryDialog.description: Append a repository to project "{{projectName}}" from a local path.

picker.title: Select repository folder
picker.description: Pick a folder to add to project "{{projectName}}".

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Get started by creating your first project.

linkDialog.title: Link Project to Remote Project
linkDialog.description: Link this local project to a remote project for collaboration and syncing.
linkDialog.noOrganizations: No organizations available. Create an organization first.

loginRequired.title: Login Required
loginRequired.description: You need to be logged in to link projects.

linkDialog.noRemoteProjects: No remote projects found in this organization. Try creating a new one instead.

projectNotFound: The project you're looking for doesn't exist or has been deleted.
copyFilesPlaceholderWithSearch: File paths or glob patterns (e.g., .env, config/*.json)
